beefs.title: The Odyssey (2026 film)
beefs.about: Revised and restructured Cast info. Organized sub-bullets for Suitors and [ship] Crew. Added sourced cited note about some character/cast details: the press tour promotion at Vulture.com discussed how Sinon was borrowed from Aeneid, and Clytemnestra and Helen being twins was a novelty (normally half-sisters in mythology). Also moved several named characters from the legendary poem to the bullet list instead of a paragraph prose round-up, because of visible importance
quotes: Revised and restructured Cast info. Organized sub-bullets for Suitors and [ship] Crew.
